No. 896(E), dated 26.03.2014. 1. Table 1 of the Notification, shall be extended by adding the following rows: Gujarat 91 249 (E) 08.02.2012 Veti Bihar 92 3517(E) 26.11.2013 Runni [F. No. NHAI/13013/ CO/ 2013-14] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy.
